label: A
text: Mix the combined mixture (all purpose flour, baking soda, brown sugar, ground cinnamon, ground nutmeg, large bowl, oats, salt, walnut)

label: B
text: Crack the eggs into a bowl

label: G
text: Portion out the combined mixture (all purpose flour, baking soda, egg, fork, ground cinnamon, ground nutmeg, large bowl, raisin, salt, vanilla extract, vegetable oil, water)

label: I
text: Add the combined mixture (egg, fork, large bowl, raisin, vanilla extract, vegetable oil, water)

label: O
text: Beat (cream) the egg and large bowl

label: P
text: Transfer the combined mixture (all purpose flour, baking soda, egg, fork, ground cinnamon, ground nutmeg, large bowl, raisin, salt, vanilla extract, vegetable oil, water)

label: U
text: Bake the combined mixture (all purpose flour, baking soda, cookie sheet, egg, fork, ground cinnamon, ground nutmeg, large bowl, raisin, salt, vanilla extract, vegetable oil, water) at 10°C

label: V
text: Mix the combined mixture (all purpose flour, baking soda, egg, fork, ground cinnamon, ground nutmeg, large bowl, raisin, salt, vanilla extract, vegetable oil, water)
